summary: Iteration 59: Complete CRO (Conversion Rate Optimization) system testing. All 17 backend API tests PASSED. All frontend features verified working: A/B testing, conversion tracking, exit intent popup, social proof, scroll animations, pricing, mobile sticky CTA.
passed_tests: BACKEND: GET /api/cro/ab-test/hero_headline - assigns A/B variant (control or variant_a)
BACKEND: GET /api/cro/ab-test/cta_text - assigns CTA A/B variant
BACKEND: GET /api/cro/ab-test/invalid_test - returns 404 for invalid test
BACKEND: GET /api/cro/ab-test/hero_headline/results - shows test results with visitors, clicks, purchases, rates
BACKEND: POST /api/cro/track - tracks page_view event
BACKEND: POST /api/cro/track - tracks cta_click event
BACKEND: POST /api/cro/track - tracks begin_checkout event
BACKEND: POST /api/cro/track - tracks purchase_complete event
BACKEND: GET /api/cro/funnel - returns conversion funnel metrics (page_view → cta_click → begin_checkout → purchase_complete)
BACKEND: GET /api/cro/funnel?days=30 - returns funnel for custom period
BACKEND: POST /api/cro/email-sequence/start - starts email sequence for non-converting user
BACKEND: POST /api/cro/email-sequence/start - duplicate sequence returns already_active
BACKEND: POST /api/cro/email-sequence/stop - stops email sequence
BACKEND: POST /api/cro/email-sequence/convert - marks user as converted
BACKEND: GET /api/cro/email-sequence/pending - gets pending emails for cron processing
BACKEND: POST /api/cro/email-sequence/process - processes email queue
BACKEND: GET /api/cro/dashboard - returns CRO dashboard with today's metrics and active tests
FRONTEND: Landing page hero section renders with dynamic A/B content
FRONTEND: Hero headline shows A/B variant (control: '40 minutos' or variant_a: '24/7')
FRONTEND: CTA buttons navigate to /registro
FRONTEND: Trust bar visible with VISA, MC, PayPal
FRONTEND: 78% emotional stat visible with animation counter
FRONTEND: 4 'Why' cards visible with scroll reveal animation (reveal-up class animated)
FRONTEND: 3-step 'How it works' section with icons and descriptions
FRONTEND: FAQ section with 5 expandable questions
FRONTEND: Pricing section with Monthly (9,99€) and Annual (99,99€) plans
FRONTEND: Exit intent popup on mouse leave ('Antes de irte...')
FRONTEND: Social proof notification appears after delay ('{name} de {city} acaba de activar ManoProtect')
FRONTEND: Mobile sticky CTA visible on small screens
FRONTEND: Anchor links scroll to correct sections (#como-funciona, #precios)
seed_data_creation: Test email sequences created during testing with prefix test_*@testcro.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: CRO system fully tested. Key findings: A/B tests assign variants based on visitor_id cookie (hero_headline, cta_text, pricing_order). Conversion tracking stores events with visitor_id, event_type, variant, metadata. Email sequences support 3-step drip campaign (24h, 48h, 72h delays). Funnel metrics aggregate page_view → cta_click → begin_checkout → purchase_complete. Dashboard shows today's metrics and active A/B tests. Frontend correctly renders A/B variants, exit intent popup, social proof notifications, and scroll reveal animations.

hero_headline.control: ¿Y si tu hijo no responde al móvil durante 40 minutos?

steps.subject: La tranquilidad de saber dónde está tu familia
Laura localizó a su hijo en 10 segundos
Último recordatorio: 7 días gratis en ManoProtect

frontend_features.exit_intent_popup: Shows 'Antes de irte...' with 7-day trial offer
frontend_features.social_proof: Shows '{name} de {city} acaba de activar ManoProtect' after 8s delay
frontend_features.mobile_sticky_cta: Fixed bottom CTA on screens < sm breakpoint
frontend_features.scroll_animations: Why cards use reveal-up class with IntersectionObserver

mocked_apis.email_sending: Email sequences are tracked in MongoDB but actual emails are not sent (SendGrid domain not verified)
